warnings: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N1 state did not converge)
sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N1 state did not converge)

prose: The fukui-reactivity result was obtained at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (DFT, tier standard) in the gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The calculation used the specified geometry of furan. The computed most electrophilic atom has a Fukui f+ value of approximately 0.62390, indicating its susceptibility to nucleophilic attack.
